On The Brink Handyman Services — LLC

The Brinkman.
Colorado-built.
Always shows up.

A Colorado Company · Licensed and Insured

He's the guy who shows up with the right tool, the right answer, and a coffee already in hand. Repairs, maintenance, IT solutions — The Brinkman does the stuff other people put off until it becomes a problem. One character. One world. Every job, in story.

The Voice

"Yep, you should probably get that fence fixed."

The Brinkman doesn't oversell. He says what needs saying, does what needs doing, and drives off before you even find a reason to worry. Dry wit. Mountain quiet. The kind of honest that earns referrals without asking.

The Aesthetic

Red plaid.
Work boots.
Colorado winter.

Warm amber and dusty mountain tones. Imagery that looks like it was shot at 6am before a job — not in a studio. The character lives in the same landscape as the clients he serves.

What The Brinkman Does

Home Repair & Maintenance
General Handyman

Basic home repairs and general handyman tasks. If it's broken, bent, or needs attention — The Brinkman handles it.

Home Repair & Maintenance
Fence Repair

Fence repair and maintenance. That fence? Yeah, it's not going to fix itself. That'll hold.

IT & Digital Solutions
IT Services & Setup

Basic IT services, PC repair, troubleshooting, and smart home setup. The guy you call when your router makes that noise.

Services
Landscaping & Yard Work

Landscaping tasks and yard work. Takes care of the outside so you don't have to think about it.

Services
Property Cleanouts

Property cleanouts and disposal support. Clear it out, haul it off, done.

Digital Solutions
Smart Home Setup

Smart home integration and setup. Colorado homes that actually work the way they're supposed to.
